user.title: Setup Presence Profile
user.description: Configure the name and target entities for this presence simulator profile.

schedule.title: Configure Schedule
schedule.description: Set up the start and end schedule parameters. Offsets are in minutes and can be negative (e.g. -60 for 1 hour before).

error.start_time_required: Start time is required when Fixed Time is selected.
error.start_sun_event_required: Sun event is required when Sunrise/Sunset is selected.
error.end_time_required: End time is required when Fixed Time is selected.
error.end_sun_event_required: Sun event is required when Sunrise/Sunset is selected.
error.start_min_greater_than_max: Start minimum offset cannot be greater than maximum offset.
error.end_min_greater_than_max: End minimum offset cannot be greater than maximum offset.
error.replay_days_back_invalid: Replay lookback days must be a positive integer.
error.replay_jitter_min_greater_than_max: Replay jitter minimum offset cannot be greater than maximum offset.

init.title: Configure Simulator
init.description: Modify the entities and schedule parameters for this presence simulator profile.

error.start_time_required: Start time is required when Fixed Time is selected.
error.start_sun_event_required: Sun event is required when Sunrise/Sunset is selected.
error.end_time_required: End time is required when Fixed Time is selected.
error.end_sun_event_required: Sun event is required when Sunrise/Sunset is selected.
error.start_min_greater_than_max: Start minimum offset cannot be greater than maximum offset.
error.end_min_greater_than_max: End minimum offset cannot be greater than maximum offset.
error.replay_days_back_invalid: Replay lookback days must be a positive integer.
error.replay_jitter_min_greater_than_max: Replay jitter minimum offset cannot be greater than maximum offset.
